title: Neon Genesis EvangelionShito Ikusei Translation
wikitext:
[]: Neon Genesis Evangelion:Shito Ikusei Translation             Quote Post by Frogatr » Tue Sep 28, 2021 5:35 pm Hi! I'm the project Lead and Graphics editor for the english translation of Shito Ikusei! Along with Haribeau (Translator) and Illidan (programmer) we released the patch in March of this year! Check it out here! ..why am i posting it here so late,you ask? ..I just kinda forgot i know this is a pretty big Eva fan community and i wanted to do it but...anyways! Its a game for the (sadly) obscure wonderswan!(A console that appears in the rebuild movies) You play as Kaji, raising an embryonic angel to its final form!All in a cutesy tamagotchi style. You also get to roam Nerv HQ and discover secrets and re-live anime cut scenes. Its a goofy little game, and thats why i wanted to translate it.Kaji being one of my favorite characters is just incedental-really! So yeah! Discuss the game and translation here, and let me know of any bugs or problems. Thanks ☆

[]: Re: Neon Genesis Evangelion:Shito Ikusei Translation             Quote Post by RussianRiz » Tue Sep 28, 2021 5:38 pm Wow, this one is obscure. Thank you very much for the translation work! I will play it and then post a review here.

[]: Re: Neon Genesis Evangelion:Shito Ikusei Translation             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Fri Oct 08, 2021 6:50 pm Kaji sure got a lot of attention in spin-offs, what with "2015" featuring poems & reports he wrote. Thanks so much for the translation! For those interested, it's worth hunting down scans of the instruction booklet, which has cute drawings of Pen-Pen and the angel evolutions you can get.

[]: Re: Neon Genesis Evangelion:Shito Ikusei Translation             Quote Post by RussianRiz » Fri Oct 08, 2021 8:04 pm I played for a while, it was fun. The translation is very good, I didn't notice anything that needed a note. Congratulations on your loyalty to the script at work, and thank you!

[]: Re: Neon Genesis Evangelion:Shito Ikusei Translation             Quote Post by Frogatr » Fri Oct 08, 2021 8:13 pm Axx°N N. wrote: Kaji sure got a lot of attention in spin-offs, what with "2015" featuring poems & reports he wrote. Thanks so much for the translation! For those interested, it's worth hunting down scans of the instruction booklet, which has cute drawings of Pen-Pen and the angel evolutions you can get.
